title: Penguh's Snowball on a Stick
body:
![A Minecraft title image with the text: "Penguh's Snowball on a Stick"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a906dc6291b049c8ff7ea6c72dbe38a63f8bb90.png)

About

**Happy ghast too slow? Give it the zoomies with a Snowball on a Stick!** These can be crafted with one fishing rod and one snowball, just like you would a Carrot- or Warped Fungus on a Stick. Simply `[Use]` *(Default: RMB)* the rod while sitting on a happy ghast, and it will fly a little bit faster for about 15 seconds!

❗Important❗

This data pack has a **required resource pack** that you will also need to install. You can find this by going to the `versions` tab, and clicking on the version of the data pack that you have downloaded or wish to download. There you will find a `files` section underneath the `changelog` with a download for the **required resource pack**. When installing the data pack, you will need to completely reboot your world. A simple `/reload` will not be enough.
